/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/pg/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/pg/pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/pg/result.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/pg/catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/pg/monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/http/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/api/handlers_db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/api/handlers_query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/api/handlers_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/api/handlers_admin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/api/handlers_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/api/handlers_static.cpp.o CMakeFiles/getgresql.dir/src/config/config.cpp.o -o getgresql  /usr/lib/libpq.so
